name: User Rating
description: Overall average rating from app store reviews, indicating user satisfaction.

name: Storage & Bandwidth
description: The app's efficient use of storage and bandwidth, impacting content upload/download speeds and overall performance.

name: Popularity and Downloads
description: Measured by the number of downloads on app stores

name: Real-time Tracking Accuracy
description: The precision and timeliness of the delivery location updates provided by the app.  Apps with consistently accurate and frequent updates score higher.

name: User Interface
description: Ease of use, navigation, and overall user experience of the app.

name: Customization Options
description: The ability to personalize app settings and themes is considered positively.

name: Audio Quality & Features
description: Assesses bitrate options, lossless streaming availability, user interface design, and additional features such as playlists, radio, and offline listening.

name: Offline Functionality
description: Ability to access content without internet connection

name: Currency Support
description: The range of currencies supported for transfers.

name: Regional Availability
description: Number of countries/regions supporting the app

name: Additional Features
description: Apps offering complementary features like transaction tracking, budgeting tools, or alerts enhance overall value.

name: Content Variety
description: The number and diversity of news sources, topics, and formats available in the app.

name: Personalization
description: The degree to which the app tailors category browsing with personalized recommendations or highlights based on user preferences and history.

name: Data Privacy & Security
description: The app's commitment to protecting user data and ensuring privacy is paramount.

name: Integration
description: Apps that integrate well with other services (e.g., cloud storage, social media)

name: Feature Set
description: Number of additional features beyond messaging (e.g., file sharing, voice/video calls, social media integration)

name: Content Variety
description: Apps offering a broad range of lectures across diverse subjects and skill levels.

name: Regular Updates
description: Frequency of app updates, including bug fixes and feature improvements.

name: Personalization
description: The degree to which the app allows users to customize their workout plans and tracking preferences.

name: User Engagement
description: Measures how actively users interact with the app, inferred from metrics like daily active users, session frequency, and user retention rates.

name: Additional Features
description: Apps with note-taking, bookmarking, sharing, or integration with other services.

name: Cross‑Device Sync
description: How seamlessly an app syncs reading progress, bookmarks, notes, and downloaded content across multiple devices and platforms.

name: Security & Privacy
description: Strength of end‑to‑end encryption, data handling policies, and overall privacy safeguards.

name: User Base Size
description: The number of active users, reflecting the app's popularity and reach.

name: Platform Availability
description: Support for iOS, Android, and cross-platform compatibility

name: Community Features
description: Provides a community forum or social aspect for support and motivation.

name: User Reviews
description: The overall rating and number of reviews from users.

name: Cost & Subscription Model
description: The pricing structure of the app, including free features versus premium subscriptions and value for money.

name: Ease of Sharing
description: How seamlessly the app integrates sharing options to various social networks, considering the number and variety of sharing formats available.

name: Notification Frequency
description: The app should offer granular control over notification frequency, allowing users to customize alerts based on topics, sources, and delivery times.

name: Fees
description: The cost associated with sending and receiving money, including transaction fees and international transfer fees.

name: Customer Support
description: The availability and responsiveness of customer support.

name: Progress Tracking & Reporting
description: The app's ability to visualize progress through charts and reports is key to motivation.

name: Security Features
description: The presence and effectiveness of security measures such as encryption, two-factor authentication, and fraud protection.

name: Editing Features
description: The variety and quality of editing tools offered, including filters, adjustments, effects, and overlays.

name: Search Functionality
description: The efficiency and accuracy of the app's search feature for specific topics or keywords

name: Feature Richness
description: More comprehensive features for setting wallpapers, including customization options and variety, enhance the app's utility.

name: Battery Efficiency
description: App’s impact on device battery life while continuously tracking routes.

name: Accessibility Features
description: The availability of accessibility features for users with disabilities, such as screen reader compatibility.

name: Integration with Wearables
description: Seamless syncing with fitness trackers, smartwatches, and health apps.

name: Transaction Speed
description: The time it takes for the transferred funds to become available to the recipient.

name: Performance & Stability
description: The app's speed, responsiveness, and reliability – avoiding crashes or lag.

name: Integration Capabilities
description: Apps that seamlessly connect with multiple banks, credit cards, and financial accounts
